title: myosotis olympica subsp. olympica
intro: Myosotis olympica subsp. olympica, also known as the alpine forget-me-not, is a perennial plant species in the borage family that grows in alpine regions. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and expectorant effects. The health benefits of M. olympica subsp. olympica include its ability to aid in respiratory issues, such as coughs and bronchitis, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate digestive issues. Herbal preparations of this plant are often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential uses.
